title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: DeepSeek V4 is a language model featuring 1M context length and hybrid attention mechanisms including contextual sparse attention, hybrid chunk attention, and sliding window attention. The model achieves significant efficiency gains through residual connections, multi-head chunk attention, and anticipatory routing.
